meta.title: QR Code Table Ordering for Restaurants — Guests Order at the Table | Gastro Master
meta.description: With Gastro Master's QR code table system, guests order directly at the table — no waiter, no waiting time. Less staffing, higher table turnover, automatic upselling. For restaurants, cafés and bars.

hero.headline: QR Code Table System — Guests Order at the Table Themselves
hero.subline: Every table gets its own QR code. Guests scan, choose, pay — all via their smartphone. The order lands instantly in the POS system and kitchen. Less waiting, more table turns, automatic upselling.

problem.title: The Problem with Classic Table Ordering
points: Guests wait 10–15 minutes until the waiter has time to take the order — revenue that gets lost.
Staff shortages in hospitality: one fewer waiter means longer waits, worse service and lost guests.
Handwritten notes, verbally passed-on special requests — errors, wrong dishes, complaints in the kitchen.
Re-orders take forever: another beer, dessert? Guests scan the room for the waiter — and leave without re-ordering.

solution.title: The Solution: QR Code Table System
points: Every table gets an individual QR code. Guest scans — and immediately sees your menu on their own phone.
Ordering directly from the smartphone. No app installation, no waiting, no waiter stress at the counter.
Order lands instantly in POS + kitchen. No slips, no translation errors, no forgotten special requests.
Menu highlights and upselling suggestions in the digital menu — guests order an average of 18% more per table.

features.headline: Everything You Need for Table Ordering That Really Takes the Pressure Off
features.sub: Six features that turn every table into an independent ordering channel.

items.title: QR Code per Table
items.description: Individual QR codes for every table — the order is automatically assigned to the correct table number. No mix-ups.

items.title: Order Without an App
items.description: Guests order directly in the browser. No installation, no account, no obstacle — scan, choose, done.

items.title: Pay Directly at the Table
items.description: PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, credit card — all common payment methods. Guest pays, gets up, leaves. Waiter no longer needs to take payment.

items.title: Multilingual Menu
items.description: Automatic translation of your menu into German, English, French, Italian, Turkish and more — perfect for tourist areas.

items.title: Upselling & Cross-Selling
items.description: Recommendations like 'Goes well with...' or 'Another dessert?' are shown automatically — 18% higher average basket.

items.title: Live Sync with POS & Kitchen
items.description: Every order appears in real time on the POS and kitchen display. No delay, no handover errors.

useCases.headline: How Restaurateurs Use the QR Code Table System
useCases.sub: Three real scenarios from our customer base — from the trendy café to the 120-seat restaurant.

items.title: Restaurant with 80 Seats
items.story: An Italian restaurant in Munich reduced the average order time from 12 to 3 minutes. Result: table turnover rate rose from 2.1 to 2.8 per evening — without additional staff.

items.title: Bar in the Entertainment District
items.story: A cocktail bar in Berlin-Mitte lets guests re-order via QR code. Drinks revenue per guest rose 24%, because nobody waits for the barkeeper anymore — and staff work more relaxed.

items.title: Trendy Café with Tourists
items.story: A café in Frankfurt-Sachsenhausen serves 30% international guests. Since QR code ordering in 8 languages, misunderstandings have disappeared — and Google reviews rose from 4.1 to 4.7 stars.

stats.label: staff saving per shift with 40–60 seats
instead of 12 min. order time per table

testimonial.quote: During peak times we used to lose orders because waiters couldn't keep up. Since the QR code table system that's turned around: guests order themselves, the kitchen works through steadily — and we make 20% more revenue per evening.
testimonial.author: Giulia M.

pricing.headline: Pricing & Availability
pricing.note: POS add-on for restaurants, cafes and bars. The first 5 tables are included in the base price — each additional table costs +€5 / month (plus VAT). Includes individual QR codes, multilingual menu, live sync with POS and kitchen. No commission per order, no hidden fees.
pricing.tiersHeadline: Volume Pricing by Number of Tables
pricing.tiersNote: All prices net plus VAT. Larger venues with more than 50 tables receive an individual quote on request. Outdoor areas, separate rooms and events count as normal tables.

internalLinks.headline: Works Perfectly With
internalLinks.intro: The QR code table system unfolds its full potential as part of the Gastro Master ecosystem — from ordering at the table to the bill in the POS.

items.title: POS System
items.description: Every table order lands automatically in the POS — with table number, items and special requests. No manual entry, no errors.

items.title: Restaurant Solution
items.description: Complete package of POS, table management, QR ordering and reservations — specifically for restaurants, cafes and bars with table service.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions about the QR Code Table System
faq.sub: Answers to the questions we receive most often from restaurants, cafes and bars.

items.q: What does the QR code table system cost for my restaurant?
items.a: The QR code table system starts at €50 per month for the first 5 tables. Each additional table costs +€5 per month (plus VAT). A restaurant with 20 tables pays €125 per month. Included: individual QR codes, multilingual menu, live sync with POS and kitchen and all payment methods. No commission per order.

items.q: How does the QR code table system work in practice?
items.a: Every table gets its own QR code — for example as a table stand, sticker or on the menu. The guest scans with the phone camera, the menu opens automatically in the browser, the guest selects items and orders. The order lands immediately with the correct table number in the POS and on the kitchen display.

items.q: Do my guests need to install an app?
items.a: No. The QR code table system runs entirely in the browser — on any iPhone, Android phone or tablet. No app installation, no account, no registration. Guest scans, orders, done. This significantly lowers the barrier and also works reliably for elderly guests or tourists.

items.q: Can the guest also pay directly at the table?
items.a: Yes. After ordering, the guest selects their preferred payment method — PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, credit card (Visa, Mastercard) or Klarna — and pays directly via smartphone. Alternatively, the bill can also be paid in the classic way at the end with the waiter. Both options work in parallel.

items.q: Which restaurants is the QR code table system suitable for?
items.a: The system suits all businesses with table service: Italian restaurants, pizzerias, Asian cuisine, cafes, bars, cocktail lounges, beer gardens. Particularly effective with 20–80 seats and during peak times when staff are otherwise working at capacity.

items.q: Which languages does the digital menu support?
items.a: The menu is automatically translated into German, English, French, Italian, Spanish, Turkish and more. The guest selects their language when scanning. Particularly valuable for tourist areas — ordering errors from language barriers virtually disappear.

items.q: Can I control upselling via the QR code menu?
items.a: Yes. You can store matching additional products per item. The system shows these suggestions automatically in the ordering process. Our customers report an average 18% higher basket values — especially for drinks, sides and desserts that are often otherwise forgotten.

items.q: Does the QR code table system completely replace my waiters?
items.a: No — and that's deliberately not the approach. The system takes over order taking and relieves your staff. Waiters remain responsible for advice, wine recommendations, clearing tables and personal hospitality. In practice, businesses save around 1 employee per shift.

items.q: How is the QR code table system connected to my POS system?
items.a: If you already use a Gastro Master POS system, the table system is immediately ready. Orders land automatically with the correct table number in the POS and kitchen display. No separate setup, no integration, no developers needed.

items.q: Can I change the menu live, for example when something is sold out?
items.a: Yes. In the Gastro Master backoffice you can deactivate individual items at any time, adjust prices, add daily specials or restructure entire menus. Changes take effect immediately — even during active service. Sold-out items are automatically hidden in the digital menu.
